about.title: About
about.greeting: Hi! I'm Guilherme, a Fullstack Developer!
about.education1: Developer interested in management, development, and project optimization. High performance and fast learner, with experience in diverse areas such as Web Development (Fullstack), Mobile, Scripting, Cloud, Game Development, and acting in the educational field as a programming teacher.
about.hobbies: Besides all that, in my free time I enjoy developing personal projects, playing games and playing guitar and piano.

projects.title: Projects

dyeGather.title: Dye Gather
dyeGather.description: 2D game made in a game jam; you mix colors by collecting paints across the map to clear a path to the exit.

reivals.title: Reivals
reivals.description: Top-down arena shooter with short matches, focusing on fast-paced action and projectiles everywhere.

fallInTheRain.title: Fall in the Rain
fallInTheRain.description: Casual prototype about falling while dodging rain and obstacles, made to test controls and atmosphere.

pianoTrainer.title: Piano Trainer
pianoTrainer.description: Website with various music theory and practice exercises, designed to be an easily accessible tool to help musicians improve their skills.

gruconWebsite.title: Grucon Website
gruconWebsite.description: Website developed for the Grucon group to facilitate access to information about their activities and events.

projects.moreProjects: Not all of my projects are here yet!
projects.visitGithub: Want to see more of my projects? Check out my GitHub!

ford.description: Fullstack development of internal projects using Angular, Spring, PostgreSQL, Azure, and Jenkins.

bioma.description: Refactoring of a SaaS consulting system for rural producers, migrating the backend from Java (Spring) to JavaScript (NestJS) and restyling the frontend (Next.js). Responsibilities included implementing new features, integrating ETL pipelines, and configuring SSO authentication using Python (FastAPI), AWS, Docker, MySQL, and MongoDB.

wisebyte.description: Backend development of financial systems, including automatic debit integrations and the creation of web scrapers, automating the collection and extraction of data from over 1,000 PDF invoices monthly. Technologies used included Java (Quarkus), Kafka, Python (Selenium), Shell scripting, Grafana, AWS, Docker, and GitHub Actions.

arcom.description: Project development using React, TypeScript, Java (Spring), Kotlin (Jetpack Compose), SQL, and Python (Flask), including stock management systems, web and mobile e-commerce, and auxiliary applications for forklifts and pallet trucks. The projects increased inventory efficiency and reduced operational costs by over BRL 150,000 by replacing outsourced equipment and systems with proprietary solutions.

iftmTeacher.description: First experience as a teacher, teaching basic web development with HTML and CSS.

ufu.description: Software development with C, C++, and Java. Project architecture, software engineering, and general computing, including algorithms and data structures. Participation in academic projects involving applications and solutions.

iftmStudent.description: Programming skills with C, C++, C#, Python, and use of engines like Unity. SQL and databases, creating complete systems and games. Participation in projects involving game design, programming logic, and management.

techers.description: Specialization in web development with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Game development in C#, Python, and engines like Unity and Unreal. Participation in projects and hackathons from conception to implementation of games and mobile/web applications.
